base-event.title: [Application] Base Event
base-event.description: The application event in its concrete forms serves to decouple triggering the different effects across the application

identity.description: The event `identity` is broadcasted over the application event bus along with the event objects. The application events in its concrete forms serve to decouple triggering the different effects across the application.

goapi-task-returned.title: [Application] GoAPI Task Returned Event
goapi-task-returned.description: The event meaning GoAPI task returned with some result. The result is defined by the event payload.

goapi-task-processed.title: [Application] GoAPI Task Processed Event
goapi-task-processed.description: The application event informing about the fact the images from GoAPI task are persisted

active_generation_tasks_counter.description: The active Midjourney GoAPI tasks counter. Should be implemented based on the GoAPI [limits](https://github.com/WhereJuly/63-imagetron/blob/construct/backend/develop/packages/backend/.docs/midjourney-task-status-explanations.md).

prompt.description: The [prompt data](/#/schemas/prompts-image-prompt) to send with an SSE
